Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.

    Description
    protected TemperatureBasedTerminationCondition
    AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm.terminationCondition
    Self-terminates the execution of this algorithm when the temperature drops below a minimum threshold.
